Description: Minimum age of the population in the bracket
Other information: Represents the minimum age of the population within each age bracket. The unit is years.

Description: Maximum age of the population in the bracket
Other information: Represents the maximum age of the population within each age bracket. The unit is years.

Description: Sex of the population in the bracket
Other information:
Represents the sex of the population within each bracket. The categories are: 
- M (Male)
- F (Female),
- P (Total population, representing the sum of male and female)

Description: Total number of population within the bracket
Other information: Represents the count of population within each bracket. The unit is number of persons.
